name: Citius Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Citius Pharmaceuticals, Inc., headquartered in Cranford, New Jersey, is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to the development and commercialization of first-in-class critical care products, with a focus on oncology, anti-infectives in adjunct cancer care and unique prescription products.
